title: 康宁 深度研究报告 - AI 基础设施的光连接卖铲人
titleEn: Corning Deep Research Report - The Optical-Connectivity Pick-and-Shovel of AI Infrastructure
summary: AI 数据中心光纤/光缆/被动连接材料层卖铲人，与 AAOI 的有源光模块/transceiver 覆盖互补。Q1 2026核心营收$43.45亿（+18%），光通信$18.46亿（+36%，生成式AI驱动），核心EPS $0.70、核心营业利润率20.2%（Springboard目标提前一年达成）；Q2指引核心营收~$46亿、核心EPS $0.73-0.77。三大客户Meta（最多$60亿）、NVIDIA（最多$32亿股权+3座工厂）、Amazon（数十亿美元）签多年期供货协议。但股价约$221、市值约$1,900亿、约71倍2026E核心EPS（卖方均价低于市价），约$90亿债务、AI资本开支周期性是主要风险。中性/高质量但高预期（观察）。
highlights: AI 基础设施的光纤/光缆/被动连接材料层：发明低损耗光纤的康宁，被生成式AI数据中心建设拉动，光通信Q1 2026 +36%至$18.46亿；与 AAOI 有源光模块/transceiver 覆盖互补
三大客户多年期签约且部分由客户出资：Meta最多$60亿、NVIDIA最多$32亿股权投资+3座美国工厂（美国光连接产能10倍）、Amazon数十亿美元
Springboard计划兑现：核心营业利润率20.2%（提前一年达标），运行率目标2026年底约$200亿、2028约$300亿、2030约$400亿
核心风险：股价约$221（52周$51-230，约4倍重定价）、约71倍2026E核心EPS、卖方均价低于市价；约$90亿债务、AI资本开支周期性与客户集中
summaryEn: AI data-center fiber/cable/passive-connectivity pick-and-shovel, complementary to AAOI's active optical-module/transceiver exposure. Q1 2026 core sales $4.35B (+18%), Optical Communications $1.85B (+36%, GenAI-driven), core EPS $0.70, core operating margin 20.2% (Springboard target hit a year early); Q2 guide core sales ~$4.6B, core EPS $0.73-0.77. Meta (up to $6B), NVIDIA (up to $3.2B equity + 3 plants), Amazon (multibillion) signed multi-year supply deals. But at ~$221 / ~$190B market cap and ~71x 2026E core EPS (sell-side avg target below market price), with ~$9B debt and AI-capex cyclicality the key risks. Neutral / high-quality but high expectations (watch).

title: NVIDIA 深度研究报告 - AI 计算中枢的高质量与高预期
titleEn: NVIDIA Deep Research Report - The AI Compute Hub, High Quality Meets High Expectations
summary: AI 计算革命的绝对中枢，Q1 FY2027 营收 $81.6B（+85% YoY）、数据中心 $75.2B（+92%），且这份创纪录报表在中国数据中心收入归零的前提下完成，Q2 FY2027 指引 $91.0B。反直觉点：作为全球市值第一（约 $4.76 万亿），远期 P/E 约 25x 反而低于 AMD 约 58x、Broadcom 约 33x。风险不在倍数，而在分母——AI 资本开支可持续性、自定义 ASIC 替代、中国结构性丢失与循环融资减值。中性/高质量但高预期（观察）。
highlights: Q1 FY2027 营收 $81.6B（+85% YoY），数据中心 $75.2B（+92%），且在中国数据中心收入归零前提下完成；Q2 FY2027 指引营收 $91.0B
毛利率回到 75%；新增 $80B 回购 + 季度股息 $0.01→$0.25，FCF 信号强；GAAP EPS $2.39 含 $15.9B 股权未实现收益，须以非 GAAP $1.87 为准
护城河三重叠加：CUDA 生态 + 全栈系统（GPU+NVLink+网络）+ 年度节奏；结构性威胁来自自定义 ASIC（Broadcom）多于 AMD
股价约 $195.74、市值约 $4.76 万亿（全球第一），但远期 P/E 约 25x 低于 AMD 约 58x；风险在盈利预期分母而非倍数。中性/观察

title: AAOI 深度研究报告 - AI数据中心光模块高弹性与高估值考验
titleEn: AAOI Deep Research Report - AI Data Center Optics Upside Meets a Demanding Valuation
summary: AI数据中心光模块高弹性标的，Q1 2026营收$151.1M（+51%），Data Center收入$81.4M（+154%），800G产品已向大型hyperscale客户首批量产出货。Q2指引收入$180-198M，Q3随产能上线预计显著放大。但GAAP仍亏损、经营现金流-$85.4M，当前EV/TTM Sales约26.6x，客户集中和ATM稀释是核心风险。
highlights: 800G产品Q1已向大型hyperscale客户首批量产出货，Q2开始ramp，Q3随产能上线预计显著放大
Q1末800G transceiver月产能接近100,000只，美国和台湾扩产支撑AI光模块交付
股价约$171.23、市值约$137亿，EV/TTM Sales约26.6x；GAAP仍亏损、现金流和稀释风险需要严密跟踪

title: GE Vernova 深度研究报告 - AI 电力侧的卖铲人与燃气轮机超级周期
titleEn: GE Vernova Deep Research Report - The Pick-and-Shovel of AI's Power Side and the Gas-Turbine Super-Cycle
summary: AI「电力侧」瓶颈最直接的卖铲人：数据中心电力短缺同时拉动燃气轮机（Power）与电网设备（Electrification）。Q1 2026 订单 $18.3B、backlog $163B（2027 目标 $200B，从 2028 提前），燃气轮机 backlog+slot 预留年底目标 ≥110 GW；Q1 营收 $9.34B、调整后 EBITDA $896M（利润率 9.6%），并上调 FY2026 指引（营收 $44.5-45.5B、调整后 EBITDA 利润率 12-14%、FCF $6.5-7.5B）。利润率正从 FY2025 的 8.4% 向中两位数爬坡。但近一年 +117%、市值约 $2,840 亿，EV/2026E 调整后 EBITDA 约 45-48x，已计入多年爬坡，且与 AI capex 共命运、Wind 仍亏损。Q1 现金 $10.2B、senior notes $2.6B，粗略净现金约 $7.6B。中性/高质量但高预期（观察）。
summaryEn: The most direct pick-and-shovel of AI's power-side bottleneck: data-center electricity shortage pulls both gas turbines (Power) and grid equipment (Electrification). Q1 2026 orders $18.3B, backlog $163B (2027 target $200B, pulled forward from 2028), gas-turbine backlog+slots targeting >=110 GW by year-end; Q1 revenue $9.34B and adjusted EBITDA $896M (9.6% margin), with raised FY2026 guidance (revenue $44.5-45.5B, adjusted EBITDA margin 12-14%, FCF $6.5-7.5B). Margins are climbing from FY2025's 8.4% toward the mid-teens. But up ~117% in a year at a ~$284B market cap, EV/2026E adjusted EBITDA ~45-48x already prices the multi-year ramp, it shares fate with AI capex, and Wind is still loss-making. Q1 cash $10.2B, senior notes $2.6B, rough net cash ~$7.6B. Neutral / high-quality-but-high-expectations (watch).
highlights: Q1 2026 订单 $18.3B，backlog 环比 +$13B+ 至 $163B；2027 目标 $200B（从 2028 提前）；Electrification 数据中心设备订单 $2.4B（超去年全年）
燃气轮机 backlog + slot 预留 2026 年底目标 ≥110 GW；上调 FY2026 指引：营收 $44.5-45.5B、调整后 EBITDA 利润率 12-14%、FCF $6.5-7.5B
利润率从 FY2025 的 8.4% 向中两位数爬坡是估值核心变量；Q1 现金 $10.2B、senior notes $2.6B，粗略净现金约 $7.6B，与背 $64.9B 总债务的 Broadcom 形成对比
股价约 $1,056.77、市值约 $2,840 亿（近一年 +117%），EV/2026E 调整后 EBITDA 约 45-48x，已计入多年爬坡、与 AI capex 共命运、Wind 仍亏损。中性/观察

title: SanDisk 深度研究报告 - NAND寡头格局中的AI存储周期暴露
titleEn: SanDisk Deep Research Report - AI Storage Cycle Exposure in the NAND Oligopoly
summary: Q3 FY2026营收$59.5亿（+97% Q/Q），数据中心$14.67亿（+233% Q/Q），GAAP毛利率78.4%、营业利润率69.1%、GAAP EPS $23.03，FCF单季$29.9亿，零债务。五份NBM长期供货协议锁定约$420亿最低合同收入（管理层电话会口径），并授权$60亿回购。Q4指引营收$77.5-82.5亿、Non-GAAP EPS $30-33、毛利率79-81%。FY2026E P/S约16倍，但NAND是半导体中周期性最强的子行业之一，78-80%的顶峰毛利率不可持续，周期转向时盈利与估值双向收缩。
highlights: 全球最大纯NAND闪存公司，2025年初从WDC分拆独立，市值约$3,096亿
Q3 FY2026营收$59.5亿（+97% Q/Q），数据中心$14.67亿（+233% Q/Q），GAAP毛利率78.4%、营业利润率69.1%、EPS $23.03，FCF $29.9亿，零负债。Q4指引营收$77.5-82.5亿、Non-GAAP EPS $30-33、毛利率79-81%。约16倍FY2026E P/S，但NAND周期性极强，78%+毛利率不可持续
NAND上行周期+AI数据中心存储需求双重驱动，零负债、单季FCF $29.9亿
五份NBM长期供货协议锁定约$420亿最低合同收入、>$110亿财务担保、覆盖FY2027逾1/3 bit出货（管理层电话会口径，待合同披露），是『去周期化』核心尝试；并授权$60亿股份回购
核心风险：NAND周期性极强，78%+顶峰毛利率不可持续；周期转向时盈利与估值双向收缩
summaryEn: Q3 FY2026 revenue $5.95B (+97% Q/Q), Datacenter $1.47B (+233% Q/Q), GAAP GM 78.4%, OM 69.1%, GAAP EPS $23.03, FCF $2.99B, zero debt. Five NBM long-term supply agreements lock in ~$42B minimum contracted revenue (per management's earnings call) and a $6B buyback was authorized. Q4 guidance $7.75-8.25B, Non-GAAP EPS $30-33, GM 79-81%. ~16x FY2026E P/S, but NAND is one of the most cyclical semiconductor sub-sectors — 78-80% peak margins are unsustainable and cycle turns see both earnings and multiples contract.

title: Tempus AI 深度研究报告 - 精准医疗数据飞轮的高增长与高风险
titleEn: Tempus AI Deep Research Report - Precision Medicine Data Flywheel's High Growth and High Risk
summary: 精准医疗全栈平台。Q1 2026营收$348.1M（+36.1%，随Ambry并表满一年主要为有机增长），但GAAP净亏损扩大至$1.259亿（EPS -$0.71），现金降至$643.8M；管理层上调FY2026收入指引至$15.9-16.0亿。诊断+数据授权+AI飞轮模式，126%净留存率。当前股价约$51.94、市值约$93亿（2026-06-24收盘，约1.7956亿股），P/S(TTM)约7x。营收加速与亏损扩大并存，CEO累计减持$1.27亿、20.6%做空比例。
highlights: Q1 2026营收$348.1M（+36.1%，随Ambry并表满一年主要为有机增长），诊断+34.7%、数据与应用+40.5%（Insights +44.1%）
Q1 2026 GAAP净亏损扩大至$1.259亿（EPS -$0.71，vs上年-$0.40），现金降至$643.8M；FY2026指引上调至$15.9-16.0亿
当前锚点：股价$51.94、市值约$93亿、P/S(TTM)约7x（2026-06-24收盘）
数据飞轮：126%净留存率、$11亿+合同积压；CEO累计减持$1.27亿、双重股权、20.6%做空（2月口径）
summaryEn: Full-stack precision-medicine platform. Q1 2026 revenue $348.1M (+36.1%, now mostly organic) but GAAP net loss widened to $(125.9)M / -$0.71 EPS and cash fell to $643.8M; management raised FY2026 guidance to $1.59-1.60B. 126% NRR. Current price ~$51.94 / market cap ~$9.3B (2026-06-24 close), P/S(TTM) ~7x. Accelerating topline paired with deepening GAAP losses; CEO cumulative selling $127M, 20.6% short interest.

title: SK hynix 深度研究报告 - HBM垄断者的AI记忆霸权
titleEn: SK hynix Deep Research Report - The HBM Monopolist's AI Memory Dominance
summary: 全球HBM垄断者（53%份额+NVIDIA绑定），乘AI内存超级周期创纪录。Q1 2026营收₩52.6万亿（+198% YoY）、营业利润₩37.6万亿（72%利润率）、净利₩40.3万亿。自2月以来股价约涨3.5倍、市值突破$1.3万亿（约₩2,070万亿），2月『深度低估』逻辑已基本兑现；TTM P/E约28x、利润率接近周期峰值，论点重心转向峰值可持续性。韩股上市，EWY为便捷间接途径。
highlights: Q1 2026创纪录：营收₩52.6万亿（+198% YoY，+60% QoQ）、营业利润₩37.6万亿（72%利润率）、净利₩40.3万亿
自2月以来股价约涨3.5倍、市值突破$1.3万亿（约₩2,070万亿，价格×约7.08亿股）；TTM P/E约28x，深度价值逻辑已基本兑现
HBM全球份额53%、NVIDIA主供，未来三年需求已超供给；HBM4E样品H2 2026、量产2027
72%营业利润率接近周期峰值，均值回归与HBM4竞争是核心风险；韩股上市，EWY为便捷间接途径
summaryEn: Global HBM monopolist (53% share + NVIDIA lock-in) riding the AI-memory supercycle to records. Q1 2026 revenue ₩52.6T (+198% YoY), operating profit ₩37.6T (72% margin), net ₩40.3T. The stock has ~3.5x'd since February and market cap surpassed $1.3T (~₩2,070T on a price × shares basis), so February's deep-value thesis has largely played out; TTM P/E ~28x and 72% margins are near a cyclical peak, shifting the debate to durability. Korean-listed; EWY is the convenient indirect route.

title: Almonty Industries 深度研究报告 - 西方钨供应链稀缺资产的兑现考验
titleEn: Almonty Industries Deep Research Report - Western Tungsten Scarcity Asset Execution Test
summary: 2026-06-23完整重跑版：ALM股价约$18.59、市值约$5.29B；Nasdaq上市和Sangdong战略稀缺性提高关注度，但当前估值要求矿山按计划放量、钨价维持高位且融资稀释可控。
highlights: 官方financials页面已列出Q1 2026财报、财务报表和MD&A
Sangdong满产后预计供应全球非中国钨产量80%以上，是核心价值锚
结论调整为中性/高风险观察：战略稀缺性强，但项目必须兑现
summaryEn: June 23, 2026 full rerun: ALM trades around $18.59 with roughly $5.29B market cap. Nasdaq liquidity and Sangdong scarcity improve visibility, but valuation requires mine ramp execution, elevated tungsten prices, and controlled financing dilution.

title: IGV 深度研究报告 - Software-mageddon后的软件行业ETF抄底机会？
titleEn: IGV Deep Research Report - A Buying Opportunity After the Software-mageddon?
summary: 美国软件行业旗舰ETF。2026-06-25增量更新：价格$86.17（较2月+4.1%），YTD跌幅收窄至-18.45%。AUM从$79亿飙升至$167亿（+111%），反映恐慌中大量逆向资金流入。PE(TTM) 27.68，NAV $86.25。Q1 2026财报季已结束——多数头部软件公司AI转型进展好于恐慌预期，空头论点减弱但未完全失效。
highlights: Q1 2026财报季：多数头部软件公司AI转型进展好于恐慌预期，空头论点减弱
Beta 1.12（5年月度），费用率0.39%；Q2财报季（7-8月）为下一核心验证节点
summaryEn: U.S. software sector flagship ETF. Jun 25, 2026 incremental update: Price $86.17 (+4.1% from Feb), YTD decline narrowed to -18.45%. AUM surged from $7.9B to $16.7B (+111%), reflecting massive contrarian inflows during the panic. PE(TTM) 27.68, NAV $86.25. Q1 2026 earnings season complete — most leading software companies reported AI transition progress better than panic expectations; bear case weakened but not fully invalidated.

title: Airbnb 深度研究报告 - 全球短租霸主的增长再加速之问
titleEn: Airbnb Deep Research Report - Can the Global Short-Term Rental Leader Re-Accelerate Growth?
summary: Q1 2026营收+17.9%超预期，增长加速叙事获得首个硬数据支撑。但股价已从$119涨至$142.90（+20%），P/E从29x扩至35.4x，P/S 6.8x，TTM杠杆FCF从$46亿降至$31.9亿。市场已部分定价增长改善，利润率压缩和FCF质量需关注。核心张力：增长加速兑现vs估值提前反映。
highlights: 股价$142.90、市值$857亿，TTM P/E 35.4x、P/S 6.8x、P/FCF(TTM杠杆) 26.9x（或FY2025基准18.6x）
Q1 2026营收同比+17.9%（超14-16%指引），增长加速兑现；但盈利增速仅+3.9%，利润率压缩
TTM杠杆FCF $31.9亿（vs FY2025 $46亿），运营现金流TTM $45.7亿，FCF质量需关注
核心矛盾：增长加速已初步兑现，但估值已从2月大幅扩张，需要Q2-Q4持续证据支撑
summaryEn: Q1 2026 revenue +17.9% YoY beat 14-16% guidance, delivering first hard data for the growth acceleration thesis. But the stock has risen from $119 to $142.90 (+20%), P/E expanded from 29x to 35.4x, P/S 6.8x, and TTM levered FCF declined from $4.6B to $3.19B. The market has partially priced in the improvement; margin compression and FCF quality warrant monitoring. Core tension: growth acceleration delivered vs. valuation front-running.

Business fundamentals (CRM dominance + margin expansion + $2.9B AI ARR) are intact, but market pricing has reached extreme value territory. Analyst consensus $250 (+66% upside), 8.61% short interest.
summary: 全球CRM霸主，FY2026营收$41.5B(+10%), FCF $14.4B(+16%), Non-GAAP利润率34.1%。Agentforce + Data 360合计ARR $2.9B+(+200% YoY)。2026-06-25更新: 股价从$193暴跌至~$151(YTD -40%), 市值$1,251亿, Forward P/E从~17x压缩至11.22x, P/S(TTM) 2.92x, FCF yield ~11.5%。业务基本面(CRM霸主+利润扩张+$2.9B AI ARR)未变, 但市场定价已进入极端价值区域。分析师共识$250(+66%上行), 空头占比8.61%。

title: Amazon 深度研究报告 - AI基础设施豪赌与飞轮加速
titleEn: Amazon Deep Research Report - The AI Infrastructure Bet and Flywheel Acceleration
summary: 全球最大电商+云计算巨头。Q1 FY2026实际营收$181.5B(+17%, AWS加速至+28%创15季新高), 营业利润$23.9B(13.1%利润率创纪录); 净利润$30.3B含约$16.8B Anthropic投资一次性收益。$200B CapEx计划推进中, FCF承压(TTM $9.8B)。当前股价$228.15, 市值~$2.52T, GAAP P/E 27.75x/正常化~31.6x。核心张力: AI基础设施豪赌的回报周期 vs 零售+云+广告三引擎的利润动能。
highlights: Q1 FY2026 AWS加速至+28%(15季新高), AI服务年化收入超$150亿
$200B CapEx大部分投向AI基础设施, 短期FCF受压(TTM $9.8B)但长期构筑护城河
Q1营业利润$23.9B(13.1%利润率创纪录); 广告收入继续+20%+增长, 成第三利润引擎
GAAP P/E 27.75x(含$16.8B Anthropic一次性收益)/正常化~31.6x, EV/EBITDA约16.6x
summaryEn: Global e-commerce + cloud leader. Q1 FY2026 actuals: revenue $181.5B (+17%, AWS accelerated to +28% — a 15-quarter high), op income $23.9B (record 13.1% margin); net income $30.3B included a ~$16.8B one-time Anthropic investment gain. $200B CapEx plan underway, FCF pressured (TTM $9.8B). Current price $228.15, MC ~$2.52T, GAAP P/E 27.75x / normalized ~31.6x. Core tension: AI infra bet payback timeline vs retail+cloud+ads profit momentum.

The June 25 valuation snapshot still stands: price $71.82, market cap $302.5B, TTM P/E 23.17x, Forward P/E 22.37x. Q1 2026 beat and operating margin rose to 32.30%, but the thesis now rests on ads, content ROI, live/sports execution, and capital allocation.

title: Spotify 深度研究报告 - 全球音频科技平台的盈利转型与估值再评估
titleEn: Spotify Deep Research Report - The Global Audio Tech Platform's Profitability Transformation and Valuation Reassessment
summary: 全球最大音频流媒体平台，已完成从长期亏损到盈利的转型。Q1 2026 TTM运营利润率15.77%、MAU 7.61亿、净利€2.71B（约$3.0B）。2026/6/25增量更新：股价$442、市值~$910亿、Forward P/E ~31x，较2月初次覆盖时P/E从~53-66x大幅压缩。估值压力显著缓解，但上行空间收窄至~13%。
highlights: TTM P/E ~30x（vs 2月~53-66x），Forward P/E ~31x（vs 2月~45x），盈利快速增长推动估值压缩
2月美国提价$1/月生效，Q2财报（8月4日）是关键验证点
summaryEn: World's largest audio streaming platform, transformed from chronic losses to profitability. Q1 2026 TTM operating margin 15.77%, MAU 761M, net income €2.71B (~$3.0B). 2026/6/25 incremental update: price $442, market cap ~$91B, Forward P/E ~31x, compressed from ~53-66x at initial coverage in February. Valuation pressure significantly eased, though upside narrowed to ~13%.

title: NeoVolta 深度研究报告 - 美国住宅储能新势力
titleEn: NeoVolta Deep Research Report - Emerging U.S. Residential Energy Storage Player
summary: Q3 FY2026营收骤降至$2.02M（环比-56%），股价从$4.21暴跌至~$1.93（-54%），公开发行稀释65%。佐治亚工厂推迟至8月底、Infinite Grid $2亿LOI+Needham首次覆盖给予$8目标价提供远期想象空间，但近期基本面严重恶化。P/S(TTM)~5.82x，极高风险。
highlights: Q3 FY2026营收骤降至$2.02M（QoQ -56%），连续两个季度大幅萎缩；9个月累计$13.37M
佐治亚工厂推迟至8月底投产，FEOC合规已确认；Infinite Grid Capital 1.1 GWh LOI（~$2亿）
Needham 6/17首次覆盖给予买入、$8目标价；TTM P/S ~5.82x，现金$11.48M，跑道约4季度
summaryEn: Q3 FY2026 revenue collapsed to $2.02M (-56% QoQ); the stock has crashed from $4.21 to ~$1.93 (-54%), with a public offering diluting shares ~65%. The Georgia factory slipped to end-August, while Infinite Grid's ~$200M 1.1 GWh LOI and Needham's initiation at an $8 target offer long-term optionality — but near-term fundamentals have deteriorated badly. P/S(TTM) ~5.82x, very high risk.

title: COPX 深度研究报告 - 铜超级周期的杠杆化敞口
titleEn: COPX Deep Research Report - Leveraged Exposure to the Copper Supercycle
summary: 全球最大纯铜矿ETF。2026-06-25增量更新：COPX约$76.92、AUM增至$79.9亿(+8%)，加权P/E从30-35x压缩至17.74x（盈利兑现）。铜价突破二月bull case上沿至~$13,531/吨($6.14/lb)，但price基本持平反映关税不确定性。YTD回报从+20.14%回落至+5.45%。COMEX溢价和232条款审查是短期核心变量。
highlights: COPX约$76.92，AUM增至$79.9亿(+8%)，加权P/E从30-35x压缩至17.74x
COMEX铜价~$13,531/吨($6.14/lb)，突破二月bull case上沿$13,000/吨
YTD回报从+20.14%(Feb)回落至+5.45%，价格路径波动剧烈
232条款关税审查临近（2026年中），COMEX溢价和关税走向是近期最大二元变量
summaryEn: The largest pure-play copper miners ETF. June 25, 2026 incremental update: COPX trades ~$76.92, AUM grew to $7.99B (+8%), weighted P/E compressed from 30-35x to 17.74x (earnings delivery). Copper at ~$13,531/tonne ($6.14/lb) exceeds February's bull case ceiling, but flat COPX price reflects tariff uncertainty. YTD return down from +20.14% to +5.45%. COMEX premium and Section 232 review are the key near-term variables.

Enrique Lores进入CEO执行期，三业务重组与约$1.5B降本计划待验证
Nasdaq 2026-06-18报价$42.51，市值约$37.5B；旧估值区间已标记为历史框架

title: OKLO 深度研究报告 - 先进核能的想象力与现实 - 重跑前归档版
titleEn: OKLO Deep Research Report - Advanced Nuclear's Imagination vs Reality - Pre-rerun Archive
summary: 归档的2026H1重跑前版本，保留2月项目管线、目标价、首堆和零收入估值框架。
highlights: 重跑前归档版本
保留原始判断与旧估值框架
作为当前完整重跑版本的对照基线
summaryEn: Archived pre-rerun 2026H1 baseline preserving the February pipeline, target-price, first-reactor, and zero-revenue valuation framework.

title: Oklo 深度研究报告 - 前商业化核能期权与AI电力需求
titleEn: Oklo Deep Research Report - Pre-Commercial Nuclear Optionality Meets AI Power Demand
summary: 2026-06-23完整重跑版：OKLO股价约$58.40、市值约$10.15B；公司仍处首堆商业化前阶段，Meta/Switch等客户需求强化想象空间，但NRC许可、燃料、首堆成本和客户合同转化仍是决定性变量。
highlights: 股价约$58.40、市值约$10.15B，仍是高波动前商业化核能期权
AI数据中心电力需求强化长期需求，但公司仍无商业收入
NRC许可、燃料供应和首堆时间线是核心验证点
估值不适合用P/E或EV/Sales，需用概率加权项目NAV框架
summaryEn: June 23, 2026 full rerun: OKLO trades around $58.40 with roughly $10.15B market cap. The company remains pre-commercial; Meta/Switch-like demand strengthens the option value, but NRC licensing, fuel, first-plant cost, and customer conversion remain decisive.

title: Broadcom 深度研究报告 - 自定义 AI 硅的卖铲人与 VMware 现金机器
titleEn: Broadcom Deep Research Report - The Pick-and-Shovel of Custom AI Silicon, Plus a VMware Cash Machine
summary: 自定义 AI 硅（XPU）最大的卖铲人，正是 NVIDIA 报告点名的最深结构性威胁的承接方；同时握有 VMware 软件现金机器。Q2 FY2026 营收 $22.19B（+48%），AI 半导体 $10.8B（+143%），AI backlog >$30B，FY2027 AI 目标 >$1000 亿；Google/Meta/字节/Anthropic/OpenAI/Fujitsu 等客户项目与 $73B backlog 属公开报道/市场拆解口径，非全部官方确认。但收入兑现后置到 FY2027、客户高度集中、总债务 $64.9B、净债务约 $45B。市值约 $1.8 万亿、远期 P/E 约 33x，介于 NVIDIA ~25x 与 AMD ~58x 之间。中性/高质量但高预期（观察）。
summaryEn: The biggest pick-and-shovel of custom AI silicon (XPUs) - the very threat named in the NVIDIA report - plus a VMware software cash machine. Q2 FY2026 revenue $22.19B (+48%), AI semis $10.8B (+143%), AI backlog >$30B, FY2027 AI target >$100B; customer programs such as Google/Meta/ByteDance/Anthropic/OpenAI/Fujitsu and the $73B backlog are public-reporting / market-breakdown inputs, not all official confirmations. Delivery is back-loaded to FY2027, customers are concentrated, total debt is $64.9B and net debt is roughly $45B. Market cap ~$1.8T, forward P/E ~33x, between NVIDIA ~25x and AMD ~58x. Neutral / high-quality-but-high-expectations (watch).
highlights: FY2027 AI 半导体目标 >$1000 亿；公开报道涉及 Google/Meta/字节/Anthropic/OpenAI/Fujitsu 等 XPU 项目与 $73B backlog 估算——但兑现后置到 FY2027、客户高度集中，非全部为官方确认订单
两台引擎：AI 定制硅增长 + VMware 软件现金（非 GAAP 营业利润率 67%、FCF 占收入 46%）；总债务 $64.9B、Q2 期末现金 $19.63B，净债务约 $45B
市值约 $1.8 万亿、远期 P/E 约 33x，介于 NVIDIA ~25x 与 AMD ~58x 之间；风险在 FY2027 兑现分母而非倍数。中性/观察
